ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states_uts" (
  "state_ut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or UT */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the administrative unit (e.g., State, UT) */,
  "state_ut_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or UT */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or UT */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the state or UT in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or UT */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the state or UT was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state or UT's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_ut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_statistics" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial statistic entry */,
  "state_ut_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or UT */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "total_persons_under_trial" INTEGER /* Total number of persons under trial, including those from the previous year */,
  "persons_cases_compounded_withdrawn" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose cases were compounded or withdrawn */,
  "persons_trial_completed" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose trials were completed */,
  "persons_trial_pending" INTEGER /* Number of persons whose trials remained pending */,
  "persons_convicted" INTEGER /* Number of persons convicted */,
  "pendency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of trials pending */,
  "all_india_pendency_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of pendency relative to the all-India total */,
  "total_cases_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of cases registered */,
  "cases_remaining_from_previous_year" INTEGER /* Number of cases remaining from the previous year */,
  "new_cases_registered" INTEGER /* Number of new cases registered in the current period */,
  "cases_closed" INTEGER /* Number of cases closed (including dismissed, withdrawn, or acquitted) */,
  "cases_pending_for_more_than_6_months" INTEGER /* Number of cases pending for more than 6 months */,
  "cases_pending_for_more_than_1_year" INTEGER /* Number of cases pending for more than 1 year */,
  "average_trial_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trials in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trial statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_statistics_state_ut_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_ut_id") REFERENCES states_uts ("state_ut_id")
)
